TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Dakan-ecuťĀĒśĖ°ÁąĺśóŹ == Dakan-ecu, nakamuan u Dakan-eyi, nu Mungku binacadan, tatapangan a tuas nuheni u Cidan-zen, u Cunha-minkuo kunhe-kuo nu adidiay a binacadan, tada angangangan nikakenihan itida i Mungku kitidaan a Hulun-piae-se Muoli-tawa Dakan-ecu niyadu'an atu Hialun-censen Cici-haese Mialise- Dakan-ecu a kitidaan, adidi' ku muenengay i Sincin-tacen. kakenihan i E'luose, pilecadan nu kitidaan a E'luose u Dakan-liya " –Ē–į—É—Ä–ł—Ź", u Waypiaycia-e. . likisiś≠∑ŚŹ≤ kakungkuan nu Dakan-ecu, yu cacay a lasubuan nu pina a mihcaan, cacaya a hitayan nu Cidan misangan tu aenengan, eneneng satu itida. nina hitay a sakakaay ci Sacie-dihan, u Dakan nu daduducan a tuas. idaw ku siace musakamuay " Dakan" u Cidan " Tahe" ngangan, Tahe a ngalngalan. ayda nipikinkiwan tu DNA nakamuan tu sumamaday nu mapataya a tataynaan nu Cidan atu nu aydaay a Dakane, E'wenke', Mungku-cu atu Hancu tu idang nipilecadan mikinkiwan tu binacadan, sakamusa tu labuay nu Cunkuo a binacadan, Dakane-cu atu Cidan sinikalecadan nuheni tu taasan, u iluc nu Cidan a tademaw sa. .ŤÄĆÁŹĺšĽ£DNA . caynem-caynem mihcaan Nueha-ce' u ngangan Han han. sakatusa a mihcaan midebung tu Hailun-cin tebang nu kitidaan a Saha-linpu, tawya a Dakane atu kitidaan nu niyadu' u Sahalin "Š†įŠ††Š°•Š††Š†ĮŠ°≥Š†∂Š††Š†®" sahaliyan, Mamyi nipanganganan tu Hialun-cin a nganganan, u picedekan nu sapatata' a nganganan nu Saha-eca " Š†įŠ††Š°•Š††Š†ĮŠ†īŠ††, sahalca, imi nu Mamyi u Hiadiaw" niyadu'an, atu nu E'wenke' nipanganganan tu Suolunpu. 1616 , sahaliyan, , sahalca, . caysip a seci nu ayawan nu cuoye, Daekan-zen kakenihan i Waysin- anlin timulan nu Cinci-licin " aydaay nu labu nu E'luose Ciya-he" Heku atu walian nu Niwmang-cin "aydaay nu labu nu E'luose Pu'leiya-he", nutipan katukuh i Sele'-ke'he nu Hialun-cin amisa nu dadipasan a tepatepadan. 17 . E'kuo tademaw itida i caynem-limsep mihcaan katuku i Ceaya-he nu kitidaan, makaadih ku nuhenian tu nika lekalan nu sakayliwmah, E'kuo mianin tu nuhenian mialaw tu banuh banges nu kalisiwan, nika pasayda ku nuheni i Sunce pabeli tu kalisiw, sisa kaiyan nuheni patahekal, pacicien ku nuheni mabulaw taydan i Nencin kitidaan. . Cindin-liwcinyun sanse sakamusa tu Dakane " Tahe, tahue", "Tacawe" Dahue. Cinday Sincen a Dadane-cu namaka Suolunpu sapangangan u Suoluncu, pabulawan tu adidaay nu tademawan taydan i Sincin-tacen kitidaan misebeng i bukebukelaan. . Caysiw-lucay mihcaan debungan nu Dipun ku Cunkuo wali amisan nu kitidaan, miwawies ku Daekun-cu milebu tu nuhenian. Caysiw-limlu mihcaan, sakamusa ninabinacadan mangalay pataluma' tu nuudip a binacadan nu nganganan, sisa palecad hantu Dakane. 1931 . sakayliwmahŤĺ≤ś•≠ tada kaluk ku kawaw nu Dakane, alahican miadup ku kawaw nuheni, manamuh tu "kucim a belacan" hinapalamel i buling tu akutiaay nu hemayan atu buling nu mugiyan a walay, piyang. buling atu nimelecan tu basis a mugian sipalamel i aam kanamuhan nu babalaki a kakanen. lami' hantu idaw ku "waci sawada' nu pabuy", " hannu limaen mikamel ku basis", " kunpile' liwkawya", manamuh mutabaku, minanum tu ucia atu epah. tanayuay nu tenliw ku nikuc, sitatelecan ku tatami, tatayna han nai' ku tateleca. hinasikad tu babalaki, halitademaw ku tapang nu luma'. . Dakane binacadan sumamad ni palumaan tu kakanen a tuudan idaw ku Cice, Ciwmay, kupkup u tabakiay nu umahan ku papalumaan, kakanen tu hemay wadayan atu papah nu tabaku tida i bawbawbian a paluma'. yadah kunipahabay tu subayuan nu Dakanecu u sasalamaan mikacaw a subayu atu sakay kelakelaan ku duma, sakayliwmah han u katalan ku malukay. . pahutin hananay ku subayu nuheni caay papiungen inai' ku mikacaway, Dakane binacadan idaw namin ku nipahabay tu pinaay a katalanan u kakanen tu buling ku yadahay, inai' ku pacakaya tu bulingbuling aca. tidaay a binacadan pahabay henay tu pabuy atu tulakuk, caay pahabay tu taduk, gaciw. nipalumaan nu binacadan tu papah nu tabaku han anu tadayadah caay kamin a cuhcuhen sa sipacakay ku duma a tatabakuan. . palutatengaan atu lisin ŚģóśēôŤąáÁŅíšŅó mihmihcaan tu cacaya a bulad tu caynem a demiad u sapala'cu a demiadan picidekan nu binacadan a demiadan, nu dumaan a sakalimulan a demiadan milecad tu layak a sikawaw, idaw ku pisiwgacuan, tasa a bulad tusa a demiad, pilincunan sa, nika limulakan a dimiada idaw ku caaya pilecad tu kalimulakan. sakay taleacawaan cacay ku tatama cacay ku tatayna, caay ka palemangsa a mikikung, caay pakasiacawa tu babalaki ku sasaacawaan. .
S.PHON: == dakan-…ô ¶u**** == dakan-…ô ¶u, nakamuan u dakan-…ôi, nu muŇčku bina ¶adan, tatapaŇčan a tuas nuńß…ôni u ¶idan-z…ôn, u ¶unńßa-minkuo kunńß…ô-kuo nu adidiaj a bina ¶adan, tada aŇčaŇčaŇčan nikak…ônińßan itida i muŇčku kitidaan a ńßur~…ĺun-pia…ô-s…ô muor~…ĺi-tawa dakan-…ô ¶u nijadu Ē~ °an atu ńßiar~…ĺun- ¶…ôns…ôn ¶i ¶i-ńßa…ôs…ô miar~…ĺis…ô- dakan-…ô ¶u a kitidaan, adidi Ē~ ° ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i sin ¶in-ta ¶…ôn. kak…ônińßan i …ô Ē~ °r~…ĺuos…ô, pir~…ĺ…ô ¶adan nu kitidaan a …ô Ē~ °r~…ĺuos…ô u dakan-r~…ĺija " ******", u wajpiaj ¶ia-…ô. . r~…ĺikisi** kakuŇčkuan nu dakan-…ô ¶u, ju ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubuan nu pina a mińß ¶aan, ¶a ¶aja a ńßitajan nu ¶idan misaŇčan tu a…ôn…ôŇčan, …ôn…ôn…ôŇč satu itida. nina ńßitaj a sakakaaj ¶i sa ¶i…ô-dińßan, u dakan nu dadudu ¶an a tuas. idaw ku sia ¶…ô musakamuaj " dakan" u ¶idan " tańß…ô" ŇčaŇčan, tańß…ô a Ňčar~…ĺŇčar~…ĺan. ajda nipikinkiwan tu dna nakamuan tu sumamadaj nu mapataja a tatajnaan nu ¶idan atu nu ajdaaj a dakan…ô, …ô Ē~ °w…ônk…ô Ē~ °, muŇčku- ¶u atu ńßan ¶u tu idaŇč nipir~…ĺ…ô ¶adan mikinkiwan tu bina ¶adan, sakamusa tu r~…ĺabuaj nu ¶unkuo a bina ¶adan, dakan…ô- ¶u atu ¶idan sinikar~…ĺ…ô ¶adan nuńß…ôni tu taasan, u ir~…ĺu ¶ nu ¶idan a tad…ômaw sa. .***dna . ¶ajn…ôm- ¶ajn…ôm mińß ¶aan nu…ôńßa- ¶…ô Ē~ ° u ŇčaŇčan ńßan ńßan. sakatusa a mińß ¶aan mid…ôbuŇč tu ńßair~…ĺun- ¶in t…ôbaŇč nu kitidaan a sańßa-r~…ĺinpu, tawja a dakan…ô atu kitidaan nu nijadu Ē~ ° u sańßar~…ĺin "*********" sańßar~…ĺijan, mamji nipaŇčaŇčanan tu ńßiar~…ĺun- ¶in a ŇčaŇčanan, u pi ¶…ôd…ôkan nu sapatata Ē~ ° a ŇčaŇčanan nu sańßa-…ô ¶a " *******, sańßar~…ĺ ¶a, imi nu mamji u ńßiadiaw" nijadu Ē~ °an, atu nu …ô Ē~ °w…ônk…ô Ē~ ° nipaŇčaŇčanan tu suor~…ĺunpu. **** , sańßar~…ĺijan, , sańßar~…ĺ ¶a, . ¶ajsip a s…ô ¶i nu ajawan nu ¶uoj…ô, da…ôkan-z…ôn kak…ônińßan i wajsin- anr~…ĺin timur~…ĺan nu ¶in ¶i-r~…ĺi ¶in " ajdaaj nu r~…ĺabu nu …ô Ē~ °r~…ĺuos…ô ¶ija-ńß…ô" ńß…ôku atu war~…ĺian nu niwmaŇč- ¶in "ajdaaj nu r~…ĺabu nu …ô Ē~ °r~…ĺuos…ô pu Ē~ °r~…ĺ…ôija-ńß…ô", nutipan katukuńß i s…ôr~…ĺ…ô Ē~ °-k…ô Ē~ °ńß…ô nu ńßiar~…ĺun- ¶in amisa nu dadipasan a t…ôpat…ôpadan. ** . …ô Ē~ °kuo tad…ômaw itida i ¶ajn…ôm-r~…ĺims…ôp mińß ¶aan katuku i ¶…ôaja-ńß…ô nu kitidaan, makaadińß ku nuńß…ônian tu nika r~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan nu sakajr~…ĺiwmańß, …ô Ē~ °kuo mianin tu nuńß…ônian miar~…ĺaw tu banuńß baŇč…ôs nu kar~…ĺisiwan, nika pasajda ku nuńß…ôni i sun ¶…ô pab…ôr~…ĺi tu kar~…ĺisiw, sisa kaijan nuńß…ôni patańß…ôkar~…ĺ, pa ¶i ¶i…ôn ku nuńß…ôni mabur~…ĺaw tajdan i n…ôn ¶in kitidaan. . ¶indin-r~…ĺiw ¶injun sans…ô sakamusa tu dakan…ô " tańß…ô, tańßu…ô", "ta ¶aw…ô" dańßu…ô. ¶indaj sin ¶…ôn a dadan…ô- ¶u namaka suor~…ĺunpu sapaŇčaŇčan u suor~…ĺun ¶u, pabur~…ĺawan tu adidaaj nu tad…ômawan tajdan i sin ¶in-ta ¶…ôn kitidaan mis…ôb…ôŇč i buk…ôbuk…ôr~…ĺaan. . ¶ajsiw-r~…ĺu ¶aj mińß ¶aan d…ôbuŇčan nu dipun ku ¶unkuo war~…ĺi amisan nu kitidaan, miwawi…ôs ku da…ôkun- ¶u mir~…ĺ…ôbu tu nuńß…ônian. ¶ajsiw-r~…ĺimr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan, sakamusa ninabina ¶adan maŇčar~…ĺaj patar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu nuudip a bina ¶adan nu ŇčaŇčanan, sisa par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ńßantu dakan…ô. **** . sakajr~…ĺiwmańß** tada kar~…ĺuk ku kawaw nu dakan…ô, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an miadup ku kawaw nuńß…ôni, manamuńß tu "ku ¶im a b…ôr~…ĺa ¶an" ńßinapar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ i bur~…ĺiŇč tu akutiaaj nu ńß…ômajan atu bur~…ĺiŇč nu mugijan a war~…ĺaj, pijaŇč. bur~…ĺiŇč atu nim…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶an tu basis a mugian sipar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ i aam kanamuńßan nu babar~…ĺaki a kakan…ôn. r~…ĺami Ē~ ° ńßantu idaw ku "wa ¶i sawada Ē~ ° nu pabuj", " ńßannu r~…ĺima…ôn mikam…ôr~…ĺ ku basis", " kunpir~…ĺ…ô Ē~ ° r~…ĺiwkawja", manamuńß mutabaku, minanum tu u ¶ia atu …ôpańß. tanajuaj nu t…ônr~…ĺiw ku niku ¶, sitat…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶an ku tatami, tatajna ńßan nai Ē~ ° ku tat…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶a. ńßinasikad tu babar~…ĺaki, ńßar~…ĺitad…ômaw ku tapaŇč nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. . dakan…ô bina ¶adan sumamad ni par~…ĺumaan tu kakan…ôn a tuudan idaw ku ¶i ¶…ô, ¶iwmaj, kupkup u tabakiaj nu umańßan ku papar~…ĺumaan, kakan…ôn tu ńß…ômaj wadajan atu papańß nu tabaku tida i bawbawbian a par~…ĺuma Ē~ °. jadańß kunipańßabaj tu subajuan nu dakan…ô ¶u u sasar~…ĺamaan mika ¶aw a subaju atu sakaj k…ôr~…ĺak…ôr~…ĺaan ku duma, sakajr~…ĺiwmańß ńßan u katar~…ĺan ku mar~…ĺukaj. . pańßutin ńßananaj ku subaju nuńß…ôni ¶aaj papiuŇč…ôn inai Ē~ ° ku mika ¶awaj, dakan…ô bina ¶adan idaw namin ku nipańßabaj tu pinaaj a katar~…ĺanan u kakan…ôn tu bur~…ĺiŇč ku jadańßaj, inai Ē~ ° ku pa ¶akaja tu bur~…ĺiŇčbur~…ĺiŇč a ¶a. tidaaj a bina ¶adan pańßabaj ńß…ônaj tu pabuj atu tur~…ĺakuk, ¶aaj pańßabaj tu taduk, ga ¶iw. nipar~…ĺumaan nu bina ¶adan tu papańß nu tabaku ńßan anu tadajadańß ¶aaj kamin a ¶uńß ¶uńß…ôn sa sipa ¶akaj ku duma a tatabakuan. . par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan atu r~…ĺisin ***** mińßmińß ¶aan tu ¶a ¶aja a bur~…ĺad tu ¶ajn…ôm a d…ômiad u sapar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶u a d…ômiadan pi ¶id…ôkan nu bina ¶adan a d…ômiadan, nu dumaan a sakar~…ĺimur~…ĺan a d…ômiadan mir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu r~…ĺajak a sikawaw, idaw ku pisiwga ¶uan, tasa a bur~…ĺad tusa a d…ômiad, pir~…ĺin ¶unan sa, nika r~…ĺimur~…ĺakan a dimiada idaw ku ¶aaja pir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu kar~…ĺimur~…ĺakan. sakaj tar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awaan ¶a ¶aj ku tatama ¶a ¶aj ku tatajna, ¶aaj ka par~…ĺ…ômaŇčsa a mikikuŇč, ¶aaj pakasia ¶awa tu babar~…ĺaki ku sasaa ¶awaan. .
S.FORM: == Dakan-ecuťĀĒśĖ°ÁąĺśóŹ == Dakan-ecu, nakamuan u Dakan-eyi, nu Mungku binacadan, tatapangan a tuas nuheni u Cidan-zen, u Cunha-minkuo kunhe-kuo nu adidiay a binacadan, tada angangangan nikakenihan itida i Mungku kitidaan a Hulun-piae-se Muoli-tawa Dakan-ecu niyadu'an atu Hialun-censen Cici-haese Mialise- Dakan-ecu a kitidaan, adidi' ku muenengay i Sincin-tacen. kakenihan i E'luose, pilecadan nu kitidaan a E'luose u Dakan-liya " –Ē–į—É—Ä–ł—Ź", u Waypiaycia-e. . likisiś≠∑ŚŹ≤ kakungkuan nu Dakan-ecu, yu cacay a lasubuan nu pina a mihcaan, cacaya a hitayan nu Cidan misangan tu aenengan, eneneng satu itida. nina hitay a sakakaay ci Sacie-dihan, u Dakan nu daduducan a tuas. idaw ku siace musakamuay " Dakan" u Cidan " Tahe" ngangan, Tahe a ngalngalan. ayda nipikinkiwan tu DNA nakamuan tu sumamaday nu mapataya a tataynaan nu Cidan atu nu aydaay a Dakane, E'wenke', Mungku-cu atu Hancu tu idang nipilecadan mikinkiwan tu binacadan, sakamusa tu labuay nu Cunkuo a binacadan, Dakane-cu atu Cidan sinikalecadan nuheni tu taasan, u iluc nu Cidan a tademaw sa. .ŤÄĆÁŹĺšĽ£DNA . caynem-caynem mihcaan Nueha-ce' u ngangan Han han. sakatusa a mihcaan midebung tu Hailun-cin tebang nu kitidaan a Saha-linpu, tawya a Dakane atu kitidaan nu niyadu' u Sahalin "Š†įŠ††Š°•Š††Š†ĮŠ°≥Š†∂Š††Š†®" sahaliyan, Mamyi nipanganganan tu Hialun-cin a nganganan, u picedekan nu sapatata' a nganganan nu Saha-eca " Š†įŠ††Š°•Š††Š†ĮŠ†īŠ††, sahalca, imi nu Mamyi u Hiadiaw" niyadu'an, atu nu E'wenke' nipanganganan tu Suolunpu. 1616 , sahaliyan, , sahalca, . caysip a seci nu ayawan nu cuoye, Daekan-zen kakenihan i Waysin- anlin timulan nu Cinci-licin " aydaay nu labu nu E'luose Ciya-he" Heku atu walian nu Niwmang-cin "aydaay nu labu nu E'luose Pu'leiya-he", nutipan katukuh i Sele'-ke'he nu Hialun-cin amisa nu dadipasan a tepatepadan. 17 . E'kuo tademaw itida i caynem-limsep mihcaan katuku i Ceaya-he nu kitidaan, makaadih ku nuhenian tu nika lekalan nu sakayliwmah, E'kuo mianin tu nuhenian mialaw tu banuh banges nu kalisiwan, nika pasayda ku nuheni i Sunce pabeli tu kalisiw, sisa kaiyan nuheni patahekal, pacicien ku nuheni mabulaw taydan i Nencin kitidaan. . Cindin-liwcinyun sanse sakamusa tu Dakane " Tahe, tahue", "Tacawe" Dahue. Cinday Sincen a Dadane-cu namaka Suolunpu sapangangan u Suoluncu, pabulawan tu adidaay nu tademawan taydan i Sincin-tacen kitidaan misebeng i bukebukelaan. . Caysiw-lucay mihcaan debungan nu Dipun ku Cunkuo wali amisan nu kitidaan, miwawies ku Daekun-cu milebu tu nuhenian. Caysiw-limlu mihcaan, sakamusa ninabinacadan mangalay pataluma' tu nuudip a binacadan nu nganganan, sisa palecad hantu Dakane. 1931 . sakayliwmahŤĺ≤ś•≠ tada kaluk ku kawaw nu Dakane, alahican miadup ku kawaw nuheni, manamuh tu "kucim a belacan" hinapalamel i buling tu akutiaay nu hemayan atu buling nu mugiyan a walay, piyang. buling atu nimelecan tu basis a mugian sipalamel i aam kanamuhan nu babalaki a kakanen. lami' hantu idaw ku "waci sawada' nu pabuy", " hannu limaen mikamel ku basis", " kunpile' liwkawya", manamuh mutabaku, minanum tu ucia atu epah. tanayuay nu tenliw ku nikuc, sitatelecan ku tatami, tatayna han nai' ku tateleca. hinasikad tu babalaki, halitademaw ku tapang nu luma'. . Dakane binacadan sumamad ni palumaan tu kakanen a tuudan idaw ku Cice, Ciwmay, kupkup u tabakiay nu umahan ku papalumaan, kakanen tu hemay wadayan atu papah nu tabaku tida i bawbawbian a paluma'. yadah kunipahabay tu subayuan nu Dakanecu u sasalamaan mikacaw a subayu atu sakay kelakelaan ku duma, sakayliwmah han u katalan ku malukay. . pahutin hananay ku subayu nuheni caay papiungen inai' ku mikacaway, Dakane binacadan idaw namin ku nipahabay tu pinaay a katalanan u kakanen tu buling ku yadahay, inai' ku pacakaya tu bulingbuling aca. tidaay a binacadan pahabay henay tu pabuy atu tulakuk, caay pahabay tu taduk, gaciw. nipalumaan nu binacadan tu papah nu tabaku han anu tadayadah caay kamin a cuhcuhen sa sipacakay ku duma a tatabakuan. . palutatengaan atu lisin ŚģóśēôŤąáÁŅíšŅó mihmihcaan tu cacaya a bulad tu caynem a demiad u sapala'cu a demiadan picidekan nu binacadan a demiadan, nu dumaan a sakalimulan a demiadan milecad tu layak a sikawaw, idaw ku pisiwgacuan, tasa a bulad tusa a demiad, pilincunan sa, nika limulakan a dimiada idaw ku caaya pilecad tu kalimulakan. sakay taleacawaan cacay ku tatama cacay ku tatayna, caay ka palemangsa a mikikung, caay pakasiacawa tu babalaki ku sasaacawaan. .

¶aj a r~…ĺasubuan nu pina a mińß ¶aan, ¶a ¶aja a ńßitajan nu ¶idan misaŇčan tu a…ôn…ôŇčan, …ôn…ôn…ôŇč satu itida. nina ńßitaj a sakakaaj ¶i sa ¶i…ô-dińßan, u dakan nu dadudu ¶an a tuas. idaw ku sia ¶…ô musakamuaj " dakan" u ¶idan " tańß…ô" ŇčaŇčan, tańß…ô a Ňčar~…ĺŇčar~…ĺan. ajda nipikinkiwan tu dna nakamuan tu sumamadaj nu mapataja a tatajnaan nu ¶idan atu nu ajdaaj a dakan…ô, …ô Ē~ °w…ônk…ô Ē~ °, muŇčku- ¶u atu ńßan ¶u tu idaŇč nipir~…ĺ…ô ¶adan mikinkiwan tu bina ¶adan, sakamusa tu r~…ĺabuaj nu ¶unkuo a bina ¶adan, dakan…ô- ¶u atu ¶idan sinikar~…ĺ…ô ¶adan nuńß…ôni tu taasan, u ir~…ĺu ¶ nu atu kitidaan nu nijadu Ē~ ° u sańßar~…ĺin "*********" sańßar~…ĺijan, mamji nipaŇčaŇčanan tu ńßiar~…ĺun- ¶in a ŇčaŇčanan, u pi ¶…ôd…ôkan nu sapatata Ē~ ° a ŇčaŇčanan nu sańßa-…ô ¶a " *******, sańßar~…ĺ "ta ¶aw…ô" dańßu…ô. ¶indaj sin ¶…ôn a dadan…ô- ¶u namaka suor~…ĺunpu sapaŇčaŇčan u suor~…ĺun ¶u, pabur~…ĺawan tu adidaaj nu tad…ômawan tajdan i sin ¶in-ta ¶…ôn kitidaan mis…ôb…ôŇč i buk…ôbuk…ôr~…ĺaan. . ¶ajsiw-r~…ĺu ¶aj mińß ¶aan d…ôbuŇčan nu dipun ku ¶unkuo war~…ĺi amisan nu kitidaan, miwawi…ôs ku da…ôkun- ¶u mir~…ĺ…ôbu tu nuńß…ônian. ¶ajsiw-r~…ĺimr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan, sakamusa ninabina ¶adan mar~…ĺukaj. . pańßutin ńßananaj ku subaju nuńß…ôni ¶aaj papiuŇč…ôn inai Ē~ ° ku mika ¶awaj, dakan…ô bina ¶adan idaw namin ku nipańßabaj tu pinaaj a katar~…ĺanan u kakan…ôn tu bur~…ĺiŇč ku jadańßaj,
